about.title: About Concordia
about.quote: Good food brings people together — that is what Concordia has always been about.
about.p1: Concordia is a family-run Italian restaurant in Kempen. For us, harmony is not just a name — it is how we welcome guests, how we work together in the kitchen, and how every plate leaves our pass.
about.p2: We opened our doors on Concordienplatz with a simple idea: honest Italian cooking, generous portions, and the feeling that you are eating at someone's table — not in a chain.
about.p3: Today you can visit us in person or order online. Either way, the same team prepares your meal fresh when you order. No reheating, no shortcuts — just the food we are proud to serve our neighbours and families.
about.originText: Kempen is home. Our guests know us from birthdays, Friday pizza nights, and quiet lunches on the square. That trust means everything — and it is why we treat every online order with the same care as a table by the window.
about.alaanBio: Alaan shapes our menu and the rhythm of the kitchen — from dough and sauces to the dishes our regulars ask for by name. He cares about consistency: the pizza should taste like Concordia every single time.
about.jiuanBio: Jiuan brings calm focus to a busy service — pasta, grills, timing at the pass. Guests often notice the warmth first; in the kitchen, it is his steady hand that keeps everything running smoothly.

fresh.title: Fresh, always
fresh.text: Prepared when you order — not sitting under a heat lamp.

family.title: Family table
family.text: A small team that knows many guests by name.

oven.title: Stone-oven soul
oven.text: Pizza and classics with real Italian heart.

care.title: Every order matters
care.text: Pickup, delivery or dine-in — same pride on the plate.

about.kitchenTitle: From our oven to your table
about.kitchenText: Pizza, pasta, salads, al forno dishes, schnitzel, burgers and more — cooked fresh for pickup or delivery.

contact.title: Contact & locations
contact.lead: Visit us, order online, or reach out by email. We look forward to hearing from you.
contact.emailHint: For orders, please use our online menu — we reply to general enquiries as soon as we can.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.lead: A few words from guests who order with us — thank you for your trust and kind feedback.

r1.text: The best pizza in the area — always fresh, always friendly. We order every week.
r1.author: Sandra M., Kempen

r2.text: Fast delivery, hot food, fair prices. The pasta is fantastic.
r2.author: Thomas K., Willich

r3.text: You can taste the passion. Our family loves Concordia.
r3.author: Elena R., Tönisvorst

r4.text: Great online ordering — easy to customise and the 10% discount is a nice bonus.
r4.author: Markus B., Kempen

r5.text: Warm welcome, generous portions, true Italian flavour. Highly recommended.
r5.author: Julia H., Geldern

offers.title: Offers & promotions
offers.lead: Order directly on our website and enjoy rewards built in — no codes, no fuss.
offers.discountText: Order through our website and receive 10% off automatically at checkout. No voucher code needed.
offers.drinkText: Orders from €35 include a complimentary soft drink — our thank-you for choosing Concordia.
offers.step1Text: Choose Kempen and browse the full menu with photos and options.
offers.step2Text: Your 10% website discount and free drink (from €35) apply automatically.
offers.step3Text: Pay cash on pickup or delivery — we prepare everything fresh for you.
offers.promoNote: Hungry? Your table — or your doorstep — is just a few clicks away.
offers.giftText: Treat someone to Concordia — choose €10, €20, €30 or any amount. The code works only at the branch where you buy it (online or in person).

delivery.title: Delivery & pickup
delivery.lead: We deliver to selected postcodes around Kempen. Minimum order and delivery fee depend on your area.
delivery.pickupText: Prefer to collect? Order online and pick up at Concordienplatz 1, Kempen — we'll have it ready for you.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lead: Quick answers about ordering, payment and delivery.

q1.q: How do I place an order?
q1.a: Choose your branch on the homepage, browse the menu, customise your dishes and checkout online.

q2.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
q2.a: We currently accept cash on pickup and cash on delivery.

q3.a: Yes — at checkout you can choose ASAP or a scheduled time slot where available.

q4.q: How does the 10% online discount work?
q4.a: It is applied automatically when you order through our website. No code is required.

q5.a: Yes — after placing a delivery order you receive a tracking link to follow your driver on the map.

q6.a: Concordia Straelen is coming soon. You'll see it in our branch list as soon as ordering goes live.
